title: How to get a police certificate – Chad - Canada.ca
content:
## How to get a police certificate – Chad
If you need to give your fingerprints for a police certificate, this isn’t the same as giving your biometrics (fingerprints and photo) for an application.

## Name of the document you need
Police clearance certificate

## Police certificate and IRCC requirements
You must provide a police certificate when you apply for:
- some temporary residence programs
Check your application package or instructions for details.

### For residents inside Chad
Police clearance certificates are available in person or by mail at the Ministry of Justice or the High Courts.(see Contact Information for complete address).
You will need to submit an application letter explaining why a police clearance certificate is being requested.
You can also appoint a representative (a friend or relative) to apply at the Ministry of Justice or the High Courts on your behalf.

### For residents outside of Chad
Submit a request at the nearest embassy or consulate.
- A proof of residence may be requested
Ministry of Justice,
Tel: +235 522172 / 522139,
Email: cs.tchad@intnet.td
